startingCommit: b2d683c Add dashboard config page scaffold
goal: Implement a read-only source/include-aware Hyprland config graph detector and show a friendly summary on the read-only Config page without adding file picking, profile switching, layered writes, or runtime mutation.
graphEngineCapabilities: Starts from a selected/root config path and inspects connected config files read-only.
Records source/include references with source file, line number, raw line, raw target, and resolved target.
Reports connected file count, unreadable file count, multi-file status, cycles, unsupported source paths, and non-authoritative management hints.
Provides profile/mode/theme/generated/script-managed summary flags for user-facing Config page copy.

supported: tilde paths using the configured HOME directory
relative paths resolved against the file containing the source/include line
unsupportedOrPlanned: arbitrary shell expansion beyond simple tilde handling

behavior: Records whether a connected file is a symlink.
Records the symlink target when readable.
Uses read-only filesystem metadata and canonicalization only.
Reads configured script directories as plain text only.
Detects references to connected config file names or paths.
Adds possible/likely hints when scripts reference files with mutation-looking patterns such as ln -sf, cp, mv, sed -i, tee, or hyprctl reload/keyword/dispatch text.

generatedFileDetection.scope: First 12 lines of each readable connected config file.

behavior: Tracks active and visited canonical/resolved paths.
Records source/include cycles instead of recursing forever.

configPageChanges: The Config page Connected files section now uses the read-only graph summary.
It reports when connected config files are detected.
It reports unreadable connected files in user-facing wording.
It reports profile-style files and script-managed hints without exposing source graph terminology.
Choose Config File, Review connected files, and Profile switching controls remain disabled/planned.
uiTestsAdded: Updated config_page_is_read_only_scaffold_with_future_controls_disabled to prove Config page source uses the graph summary helper and keeps disabled future controls.
Existing dashboard_config_page_scaffold tests continue proving Dashboard Config card, Sidebar Config item, normal category search, and detail projection behavior.

validation.gitStatusShort: passed with current sprint changes plus pre-existing untracked local audit/design artifacts intentionally left uncommitted

proofStillMissing: Real manual file picker UI is not implemented.
Layered write-target selection is not implemented.
Glob source expansion is not implemented.
Script management hints are advisory text scans, not proof of script execution behavior.
nextRecommendedSprint: Design and implement a read-only connected-files review UI that lists detected files, hints, and unreadable paths before adding any manual file picker or write-target behavior.
